sceneDescriptions.trading-bot: Crypto/stock automated trading, requires fast response and data analysis
sceneDescriptions.customer-service: Intelligent customer support, requires language understanding and quick response
sceneDescriptions.content-creation: Article writing, copywriting, requires high-quality output
sceneDescriptions.data-analysis: Data processing, visualization, statistical analysis, requires reasoning and coding
sceneDescriptions.research-assistant: Academic research, literature analysis, requires deep reasoning and long context
sceneDescriptions.dev-tools: Code generation, debugging, refactoring, requires code understanding and generation

template.title: Template Market
template.description: Browse and search community routing config templates

templateDescriptions.tpl-trading-bot: Free models for simple signals, reasoning models for complex analysis, balanced default
templateDescriptions.tpl-customer-service: Free models for simple Q&A, high-quality models for complex issues
templateDescriptions.tpl-content-creation: Balanced models for simple content, high-quality models for deep writing
templateDescriptions.tpl-data-analysis: Low-cost models for simple queries, reasoning models for complex analysis
templateDescriptions.tpl-research-assistant: Reasoning models for inference tasks, balanced models for general queries
templateDescriptions.tpl-dev-tools: Free models for simple code, professional models for complex code

importer.title: Import Your Config

importer.noIssues: Your config looks good! No issues found.

issues.gpt4NoCondition: GPT-4 is used without routing conditions (expensive)

suggestions.addBaseUrl: Add baseUrl for each provider to ensure proper routing
suggestions.routeGpt4: Route GPT-4 to complex tasks only, use cheaper models for simple requests
suggestions.addFreeTier: Add free models like Qwen3-Coder-Free for simple tasks
suggestions.addDefault: Add a default model as fallback for unmatched requests
